text: Absolutely fantastic place. The pasta was cooked perfectly and the service was attentive without being intrusive. Will definitely return.
Terrible experience. Waited 45 minutes for a cold steak. The waiter was rude and unapologetic. Never coming back.
Average food, nothing special. The decor was nice but prices are too high for what you get.
Best brunch in the city. The eggs benedict were perfectly poached and the hollandaise was rich without being heavy.
Hair in my food. Complained and the manager was dismissive. The replacement dish took another 30 minutes.
Really solid neighborhood spot. The pizza is thin-crust and charred just right. Service was fast on a busy Saturday night.
Raw chicken served to my table. This is a health hazard. Reported to the health department.
Went for my anniversary dinner. Chef came out personally to greet us. The tasting menu was exceptional — every course was memorable.
Decent enough but nothing I'd go out of my way for. The risotto was a bit bland and the portions are small for the price.
Great cocktail menu and the small plates are creative. Ambiance is a bit loud but the food quality makes up for it.
The best ramen I've had outside of Japan. Rich tonkotsu broth, perfectly chewy noodles, and the chashu pork melts in your mouth.
45-minute wait for a table despite having a reservation. The host was unapologetic and the food arrived cold.
Consistently excellent sushi. The omakase is pricey but worth every dollar. Chef clearly sources premium fish.
Used to be great but quality has slipped since they expanded. The miso soup tasted watered down and the salmon was previously frozen.
Incredible vegetarian options in a city that doesn't always cater to us. The mushroom gyoza and agedashi tofu are standouts.
Found a piece of plastic in my gyoza. Staff offered a 10% discount as compensation. Unacceptable.
Went at opening on a weekday and had a perfect, unhurried meal. The black sesame ice cream is not to be missed.
Good but overhyped. The ramen broth was fine, not revelatory. Service was efficient but felt rushed.
Excellent karaage chicken and the house sake selection is impressive. Would return for drinks and snacks alone.
Reservation system is broken — got seated 40 minutes late. Food was good but the chaos at the front of house ruined the experience.
